requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — TR CU 020/2011 and GOST R National Standards (Radiated and Conducted Emissions)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容辐射——TR CU 020/2011及GOST R国家标准（辐射骚扰及传导骚扰）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容輻射——TR CU 020/2011及GOST R國家標準（輻射騷擾及傳導騷擾）

summary.en: TR CU 020/2011 (Technical Regulation of the Customs Union on Electromagnetic Compatibility of Technical Products) is mandatory across the EAEU including Russia and applies to all radio and electronic equipment that could cause electromagnetic interference or be affected by it. For the emissions dimension, the applicable harmonised GOST R standards are GOST R 51318.22 (Russian adoption of CISPR 22 / CISPR 32 — Information technology equipment and multimedia equipment: radio disturbance characteristics, limits and methods of measurement for Class A and Class B equipment) and GOST R 51318.14.1 (Russian adoption of CISPR 14-1 — Household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus: requirements for the suppression of radio interference). Test results from an accredited laboratory demonstrating conformity with the applicable GOST R emissions limits must form part of the EAC Declaration technical dossier. Compliance is assessed as part of the unified EAC conformity assessment procedure under TR CU 020/2011.
summary.zh: TR CU 020/2011（关税同盟技术产品电磁兼容技术法规）在包括俄罗斯在内的整个EAEU强制适用，适用于所有可能产生电磁干扰或受其影响的无线电及电子设备。在辐射骚扰方面，适用的协调GOST R标准为GOST R 51318.22（CISPR 22 / CISPR 32的俄罗斯版本——信息技术设备及多媒体设备：A类和B类设备无线电骚扰特性、限值及测量方法）和GOST R 51318.14.1（CISPR 14-1的俄罗斯版本——家用电器、电动工具及类似设备：抑制无线电干扰的要求）。经认可实验室出具的证明符合适用GOST R辐射骚扰限值的测试报告须作为EAC声明技术档案的组成部分。合规性作为TR CU 020/2011统一EAC合规评估程序的一部分进行评定。
summary.zht: TR CU 020/2011（關稅同盟技術產品電磁相容技術法規）在包括俄羅斯在內的整個EAEU強制適用，適用於所有可能產生電磁干擾或受其影響的無線電及電子設備。在輻射騷擾方面，適用的協調GOST R標準為GOST R 51318.22（CISPR 22 / CISPR 32的俄羅斯版本——信息技術設備及多媒體設備：A類和B類設備無線電騷擾特性、限值及測量方法）和GOST R 51318.14.1（CISPR 14-1的俄羅斯版本——家用電器、電動工具及類似設備：抑制無線電干擾的要求）。經認可實驗室出具的證明符合適用GOST R輻射騷擾限值的測試報告須作為EAC聲明技術檔案的組成部分。合規性作為TR CU 020/2011統一EAC合規評估程序的一部分進行評定。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Customs Union on Electromagnetic Compatibility of Technical Products (mandatory EAEU, including Russia)
GOST R 51318.22-2006 (CISPR 22) / GOST R 55306-2012 (CISPR 32) — Information technology and multimedia equipment: Radio disturbance characteristics, limits and methods of measurement
GOST R 51318.14.1-2006 (CISPR 14-1) — Household appliances, electric tools: Radio interference suppression requirements

summary.en: Chinese EMC emissions compliance for wireless IoT devices is governed primarily by GB 9254 (Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement, aligned with CISPR 22/32) enforced through the CCC system administered by CNCA. GB/T 13837 (aligned with CISPR 13/14) applies to household audio/video equipment and similar apparatus. Test reports against GB 9254 Class B limits are required as part of the CCC technical documentation. EMC emissions testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited laboratories. Chinese GB 9254 / CCC documentation is not accepted as equivalent to GOST R / TR CU 020/2011 conformity under the EAEU framework.
summary.zh: 中国无线物联网设备的电磁兼容辐射合规主要依据GB 9254（信息技术设备无线电骚扰特性——限值和测量方法，与CISPR 22/32接轨），通过CNCA管理的CCC体系执行。GB/T 13837（与CISPR 13/14接轨）适用于家用音视频设备及类似装置。符合GB 9254 B类限值的测试报告须作为CCC技术文件的组成部分，EMC辐射测试在经CNAS认可的实验室进行。中国GB 9254 / CCC文件不被EAEU框架接受为GOST R / TR CU 020/2011合规的等同替代。
summary.zht: 中國無線物聯網設備的電磁相容輻射合規主要依據GB 9254（信息技術設備無線電騷擾特性——限值和測量方法，與CISPR 22/32接軌），通過CNCA管理的CCC體系執行。GB/T 13837（與CISPR 13/14接軌）適用於家用音視頻設備及類似裝置。符合GB 9254 B類限值的測試報告須作為CCC技術文件的組成部分，EMC輻射測試在經CNAS認可的實驗室進行。中國GB 9254 / CCC文件不被EAEU框架接受為GOST R / TR CU 020/2011合規的等同替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254-2008 / GB 9254-2021 — Information technology equipment: Radio disturbance characteristics, limits and methods of measurement (aligned with CISPR 22/32, mandatory CCC)
GB/T 13837 — Sound and television broadcast receivers and associated equipment: Radio disturbance characteristics (aligned with CISPR 13/14)

gap.en: While both the Chinese (GB 9254) and Russian/EAEU (GOST R 51318.22 / TR CU 020/2011) EMC emissions frameworks derive from the same CISPR 22/32 international standard, test reports obtained to Chinese GB 9254 at a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory are not directly accepted under the EAEU conformity assessment procedure. Emissions testing must be repeated at an EAEU-accredited laboratory using GOST R standards, and the results must be incorporated into the EAC Declaration technical file. Even where limit values are numerically similar, the accreditation chain, test method references, and documentation language (Russian) differ. Products carrying a CCC EMC certification have no automatic equivalence pathway under TR CU 020/2011.
gap.zh: 尽管中国（GB 9254）与俄罗斯/EAEU（GOST R 51318.22 / TR CU 020/2011）电磁兼容辐射框架均源自同一国际标准CISPR 22/32，但在中国CNAS认可实验室依据GB 9254获得的测试报告不被EAEU合规评估程序直接接受。辐射骚扰测试须在EAEU认可的实验室依据GOST R标准重新进行，结果须纳入EAC声明技术文件。即便限值数值相近，认可体系、测试方法参考及文件语言（俄语）均有所不同。持有CCC电磁兼容认证的产品在TR CU 020/2011下不存在自动等同途径。
gap.zht: 儘管中國（GB 9254）與俄羅斯/EAEU（GOST R 51318.22 / TR CU 020/2011）電磁相容輻射框架均源自同一國際標準CISPR 22/32，但在中國CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 9254獲得的測試報告不被EAEU合規評估程序直接接受。輻射騷擾測試須在EAEU認可的實驗室依據GOST R標準重新進行，結果須納入EAC聲明技術文件。即便限值數值相近，認可體系、測試方法參考及文件語言（俄語）均有所不同。持有CCC電磁相容認證的產品在TR CU 020/2011下不存在自動等同途徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC emissions conformity under TR CU 020/2011 (GOST R 51318.22 or equivalent) is a prerequisite for EAC Declaration and EAC mark; testing must be performed at an EAEU-accredited laboratory
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 9254 EMC emissions testing required as part of CCC certification for information technology equipment sold in China; conducted at CNAS-accredited laboratories

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — Official EAEU Legal Portal

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC emissions compliance under TR CU 020/2011 (GOST R 51318.22 / CISPR 32 limits) is mandatory for wireless devices entering Russia as part of the EAC conformity assessment. Chinese GB 9254 / CCC test reports from CNAS-accredited labs are not accepted directly — testing must be conducted at an EAEU-accredited facility and the results incorporated into the Russian-language EAC technical dossier. Verify the current list of harmonised GOST R standards under TR CU 020/2011 with the EEC or Rosstandart before testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于进入俄罗斯的无线设备，TR CU 020/2011（GOST R 51318.22 / CISPR 32限值）下的电磁兼容辐射合规作为EAC合规评估的组成部分，为强制要求。中国CNAS认可实验室的GB 9254 / CCC测试报告不被直接接受——测试须在EAEU认可设施进行，结果须纳入俄语EAC技术档案。测试前请向EEC或Rosstandart核实TR CU 020/2011下的现行协调GOST R标准列表。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於進入俄羅斯的無線設備，TR CU 020/2011（GOST R 51318.22 / CISPR 32限值）下的電磁相容輻射合規作為EAC合規評估的組成部分，為強制要求。中國CNAS認可實驗室的GB 9254 / CCC測試報告不被直接接受——測試須在EAEU認可設施進行，結果須納入俄語EAC技術檔案。測試前請向EEC或Rosstandart核實TR CU 020/2011下的現行協調GOST R標準列表。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — TR CU 020/2011 and GOST R IEC 61000-4 Series (Electrostatic Discharge, Surge, Conducted Immunity)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容抗扰度——TR CU 020/2011及GOST R IEC 61000-4系列（静电放电、浪涌、传导抗扰度）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容抗擾度——TR CU 020/2011及GOST R IEC 61000-4系列（靜電放電、浪湧、傳導抗擾度）

summary.en: In addition to emissions limits, TR CU 020/2011 requires wireless and electronic devices to demonstrate electromagnetic immunity — the ability to function correctly in the presence of electromagnetic disturbances. The harmonised GOST R standards for immunity testing that apply to consumer wireless IoT devices in the Russian/EAEU market include: GOST R 51317.4.2 (IEC 61000-4-2 — electrostatic discharge immunity), GOST R 51317.4.3 (IEC 61000-4-3 — radiated electromagnetic field immunity), GOST R 51317.4.4 (IEC 61000-4-4 — electrical fast transient / burst immunity), GOST R 51317.4.5 (IEC 61000-4-5 — surge immunity), and GOST R 51317.4.6 (IEC 61000-4-6 — conducted disturbances immunity). The applicable immunity standard for IT and communications equipment is GOST R 51318.24 (aligned with CISPR 24 — immunity characteristics). All immunity testing must be conducted at an EAEU-accredited laboratory; results form part of the EAC technical dossier. Performance criteria (A, B, or C) must be stated.
summary.zh: 除辐射骚扰限值外，TR CU 020/2011还要求无线及电子设备证明电磁抗扰度——即在电磁骚扰存在的情况下正常运行的能力。适用于俄罗斯/EAEU市场消费类无线物联网设备的协调GOST R抗扰度测试标准包括：GOST R 51317.4.2（IEC 61000-4-2——静电放电抗扰度）、GOST R 51317.4.3（IEC 61000-4-3——射频电磁场辐射抗扰度）、GOST R 51317.4.4（IEC 61000-4-4——电快速瞬变/脉冲群抗扰度）、GOST R 51317.4.5（IEC 61000-4-5——浪涌（冲击）抗扰度）及GOST R 51317.4.6（IEC 61000-4-6——射频场感应的传导骚扰抗扰度）。IT及通信设备适用的抗扰度标准为GOST R 51318.24（与CISPR 24接轨——抗扰度特性）。所有抗扰度测试须在EAEU认可的实验室进行；测试结果构成EAC技术档案的一部分。须说明性能判据（A、B或C级）。
summary.zht: 除輻射騷擾限值外，TR CU 020/2011還要求無線及電子設備證明電磁抗擾度——即在電磁騷擾存在的情況下正常運行的能力。適用於俄羅斯/EAEU市場消費類無線物聯網設備的協調GOST R抗擾度測試標準包括：GOST R 51317.4.2（IEC 61000-4-2——靜電放電抗擾度）、GOST R 51317.4.3（IEC 61000-4-3——射頻電磁場輻射抗擾度）、GOST R 51317.4.4（IEC 61000-4-4——電快速瞬變/脈衝群抗擾度）、GOST R 51317.4.5（IEC 61000-4-5——浪湧（衝擊）抗擾度）及GOST R 51317.4.6（IEC 61000-4-6——射頻場感應的傳導騷擾抗擾度）。IT及通信設備適用的抗擾度標準為GOST R 51318.24（與CISPR 24接軌——抗擾度特性）。所有抗擾度測試須在EAEU認可的實驗室進行；測試結果構成EAC技術檔案的一部分。須說明性能判據（A、B或C級）。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 — Technical Regulation of the Customs Union on Electromagnetic Compatibility (immunity requirements dimension)
GOST R 51318.24-2013 (CISPR 24) — Information technology equipment: Immunity characteristics, limits and methods of measurement
GOST R 51317.4.2 (IEC 61000-4-2) — Electrostatic discharge immunity test
GOST R 51317.4.3 (IEC 61000-4-3) — Radiated, radio-frequency, electromagnetic field immunity test
GOST R 51317.4.4 (IEC 61000-4-4) — Electrical fast transient / burst immunity test
GOST R 51317.4.6 (IEC 61000-4-6) — Immunity to conducted disturbances induced by radio-frequency fields

summary.en: China's EMC immunity requirements for IT and communications equipment are covered by GB/T 17625 series (aligned with IEC 61000-3 series, covering harmonic current and voltage fluctuation limits) and GB/T 17618 (aligned with CISPR 24 — immunity characteristics for IT equipment). For consumer products more broadly, GB/T 4365 defines EMC terminology and GB/T 6113 covers radio interference measurement. Immunity testing to GB/T 17618 may be performed voluntarily or as part of enterprise standard declarations; it is not always a CCC mandatory requirement for all wireless devices. The Chinese immunity test results obtained at CNAS labs are not accepted under TR CU 020/2011 EAEU conformity assessment.
summary.zh: 中国IT及通信设备的电磁兼容抗扰度要求由GB/T 17625系列（与IEC 61000-3系列接轨，涵盖谐波电流及电压波动限值）和GB/T 17618（与CISPR 24接轨——IT设备抗扰度特性）覆盖。对于更广泛的消费产品，GB/T 4365定义了电磁兼容术语，GB/T 6113涵盖无线电干扰测量。GB/T 17618抗扰度测试可自愿进行或作为企业标准声明的一部分；对于所有无线设备并非始终是CCC的强制要求。在CNAS实验室获得的中国抗扰度测试结果不被TR CU 020/2011 EAEU合规评估接受。
summary.zht: 中國IT及通信設備的電磁相容抗擾度要求由GB/T 17625系列（與IEC 61000-3系列接軌，涵蓋諧波電流及電壓波動限值）和GB/T 17618（與CISPR 24接軌——IT設備抗擾度特性）覆蓋。對於更廣泛的消費產品，GB/T 4365定義了電磁相容術語，GB/T 6113涵蓋無線電干擾測量。GB/T 17618抗擾度測試可自願進行或作為企業標準聲明的一部分；對於所有無線設備並非始終是CCC的強制要求。在CNAS實驗室獲得的中國抗擾度測試結果不被TR CU 020/2011 EAEU合規評估接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17618-2015 (CISPR 24) — Information technology equipment: Immunity characteristics, limits and methods of measurement
GB/T 17625.1-2012 (IEC 61000-3-2) — Limits for harmonic current emissions
GB/T 17625.2-2007 (IEC 61000-3-3) — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker

gap.en: EMC immunity testing requirements under TR CU 020/2011 (GOST R 51318.24 / IEC 61000-4 series) are structurally analogous to Chinese GB/T 17618 requirements — both derive from the same IEC/CISPR international standards. However, test reports from Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratories are not accepted as part of the EAEU EAC conformity assessment; immunity testing must be re-conducted at an EAEU-accredited laboratory. Chinese products where immunity testing was conducted only as a voluntary exercise (not as part of CCC mandatory documentation) will face a larger gap, as the tests may not have been formally performed against the full GOST R IEC 61000-4 suite. Performance criteria (A/B/C) and test configurations must align with GOST R versions.
gap.zh: TR CU 020/2011（GOST R 51318.24 / IEC 61000-4系列）下的电磁兼容抗扰度测试要求与中国GB/T 17618要求在结构上相似——均源自同一IEC/CISPR国际标准。然而，来自中国CNAS认可实验室的测试报告不被接受作为EAEU EAC合规评估的一部分；抗扰度测试须在EAEU认可的实验室重新进行。仅以自愿方式进行抗扰度测试（非CCC强制文件的一部分）的中国产品将面临更大差距，因为测试可能未针对完整的GOST R IEC 61000-4系列正式进行。性能判据（A/B/C级）和测试配置须与GOST R版本保持一致。
gap.zht: TR CU 020/2011（GOST R 51318.24 / IEC 61000-4系列）下的電磁相容抗擾度測試要求與中國GB/T 17618要求在結構上相似——均源自同一IEC/CISPR國際標準。然而，來自中國CNAS認可實驗室的測試報告不被接受作為EAEU EAC合規評估的一部分；抗擾度測試須在EAEU認可的實驗室重新進行。僅以自願方式進行抗擾度測試（非CCC強制文件的一部分）的中國產品將面臨更大差距，因為測試可能未針對完整的GOST R IEC 61000-4系列正式進行。性能判據（A/B/C級）和測試配置須與GOST R版本保持一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC immunity conformity under TR CU 020/2011 (GOST R 51318.24 / GOST R 51317.4.x series) is required as part of the EAC Declaration technical dossier; testing must be at an EAEU-accredited laboratory
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary in many categories (GB/T 17618 immunity testing) but de facto required for export markets; CCC mandatory documentation focuses primarily on GB 9254 emissions

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — Official EAEU Legal Portal

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC immunity testing under TR CU 020/2011 (GOST R 51318.24 and the GOST R 51317.4.x series aligned with IEC 61000-4) is mandatory for the EAC conformity assessment of wireless devices entering Russia. Chinese GB/T 17618 test results from CNAS laboratories are not accepted. Immunity tests must be re-run at an EAEU-accredited laboratory with results and performance criteria (A/B/C) documented in Russian in the EAC technical file. Where Chinese testing was conducted only voluntarily, a full GOST R IEC 61000-4 test programme will be required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] TR CU 020/2011（GOST R 51318.24及与IEC 61000-4接轨的GOST R 51317.4.x系列）下的电磁兼容抗扰度测试是进入俄罗斯的无线设备EAC合规评估的强制要求。来自CNAS实验室的中国GB/T 17618测试结果不被接受。抗扰度测试须在EAEU认可的实验室重新进行，测试结果及性能判据（A/B/C级）须以俄语记录于EAC技术文件中。若中国测试仅以自愿方式进行，则需完成完整的GOST R IEC 61000-4测试项目。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] TR CU 020/2011（GOST R 51318.24及與IEC 61000-4接軌的GOST R 51317.4.x系列）下的電磁相容抗擾度測試是進入俄羅斯的無線設備EAC合規評估的強制要求。來自CNAS實驗室的中國GB/T 17618測試結果不被接受。抗擾度測試須在EAEU認可的實驗室重新進行，測試結果及性能判據（A/B/C級）須以俄語記錄於EAC技術文件中。若中國測試僅以自願方式進行，則需完成完整的GOST R IEC 61000-4測試項目。
